name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.9.0: Content Controls (SDT) read/write tool suite (closes #44) — 8 new tools (list_content_controls / get_content_control / list_repeating_section_items / update_content_control_text / replace_content_control_content / delete_content_control / update_repeating_section_item / list_custom_xml_parts stub) + insert_content_control extensions (4 new types, list_items / date_format / lock_type args). Built on ooxml-swift v0.15.1 SDTParser + WordDocument mutation methods. v3.8.0: header/footer raw-element preservation + counter-isolation (#52). v3.7.2: #42 verify follow-ups (#53 #54 #55). v3.7.1: update_all_fields header preservation (#42). v3.7.0: autosave Design B + insert crash hardening (#40 #41). v3.6.0: autosave/checkpoint/recover (#37).
